creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 167215
Patch

Almost every libreoffice i18n port stage an empty directory which is not included into plist, example:

Error: Orphaned: @dir lib/libreoffice/share/autotext/nr

http://package21.nyi.freebsd.org/data/102amd64-default-qat/408278/logs/errors/nr-libreoffice-5.0.4_1.log

Fix this by adding empty dirs to plist.
